expectations.evidence: The component imports and uses useFetcherPagedQuery from '@ahoo-wang/fetcher-react'

expectations.text: Pagination with index and size configured
expectations.evidence: initialQuery.pagination is set to { index: 1, size: pageSize }

expectations.text: setPagination or similar method to change page
expectations.evidence: setPagination is destructured from the hook and called in handlePageChange

expectations.text: Handles loading and result states for paginated data
expectations.evidence: Component checks loading state and destructures { data: products, pagination } from result
